# Dr. Ashish Agarwal — Laparoscopic Surgeon in Gorakhpur

> Dr. Ashish Agarwal (MBBS, MS, FMAS) is an advanced laparoscopic (keyhole) surgeon and proctologist in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. He performs minimally invasive surgery for gallstones, hernia, piles, fistula and appendix, and is empanelled under Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) — eligible patients can be operated free of cost.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98075 60443 (alternate +91 79850 32860)
- Main clinic: Daudpur, Near Bela Public School, Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh
- OPD: 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM at Pulse Hospital (Chhatrasang Chauraha, Kasya Road) and 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM at Astro Medics Super Speciality Hospital (Betiahata); on-call round the clock.

## Treatments
- [Gallbladder Stone Surgery in Gorakhpur](https://drashishlaparoscopy.com/treatments/laparoscopic-gallbladder-surgery-gorakhpur/): Laparoscopic cholecystectomy — keyhole removal of gallstones; most patients home within 24 hours.
- [Hernia Surgery in Gorakhpur](https://drashishlaparoscopy.com/treatments/laparoscopic-hernia-surgery-gorakhpur/): Laparoscopic mesh repair for inguinal, umbilical and incisional hernias.
- [Piles Treatment in Gorakhpur](https://drashishlaparoscopy.com/treatments/piles-treatment-gorakhpur/): Modern laser & stapler (MIPH) treatment for hemorrhoids (bawaseer).
- [Anal Fistula Surgery in Gorakhpur](https://drashishlaparoscopy.com/treatments/anal-fistula-surgery-gorakhpur/): Sphincter-preserving surgery for anal fistula (bhagandar).
- [Appendix Surgery in Gorakhpur](https://drashishlaparoscopy.com/treatments/laparoscopic-appendix-surgery-gorakhpur/): Laparoscopic appendectomy for emergency and planned cases.

## About
- Education: MBBS — KGMU, Lucknow; MS (General Surgery) — BRD Medical College, Gorakhpur; FMAS (Minimal Access Surgery), Delhi.
- Registration: UP Medical Council Reg. No. 64333.
- Website: https://drashishlaparoscopy.com
